title: Funding reference
description: Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.

local_identifier.description: The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).

award_title.description: The human readable title or name of the award (grant).

funding_program.description: Reference to the specific funding program.

funder.description: Relation to the agent entity of a funder.
